news.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz is closed again as vessel attempting to cross comes under gunfire
news.summary: Iranian officials say they have closed the strait because of the U.S.'s ongoing blockade of its ports. Iranian officials say it is in response to a U.N. Security Council resolution passed earlier this week.

news.title: We spoke to over 30 central bankers, policymakers and politicians. Here are their top concerns
news.summary: The U.S.-Iran war is one of the biggest risks facing the world, experts say. From stagflation to energy security, policymakers talk about the risks.

news.title: Berkshire shares left behind as S&P 500 rallies to record high
news.summary: Berkshire's shares slipped to MTD drops of just under 1%. While the overall market was soaring over the past two weeks, Berkshire wasn't doing much of anything.

news.title: Iran war, $4 gas prices, took all the fun right out of the U.S. consumer economy
news.summary: The U.S.-Iran war and $4 gas prices are hitting local economies hard. Consumers are still spending amid the war, but there's a pullback at entertainment and dining venues.

news.title: 'It's just scale': Local mom-and-pop car dealerships are growing or dying amid industry consolidation, rise of mega-retailers
news.summary: Multibillion-dollar dealerships have been on the rise amid a decadeslong consolidation that has led to a grow-or-die mentality for many U.S. auto retailers.

news.title: Trump expects his Fed chair nominee to cut interest rates. Here’s how Kevin Warsh might try to do it.
news.summary: Warsh will be pressed on his outlook for rates at his Senate confirmation hearing Tuesday. Warsh is expected to be confirmed as the next head of the Fed.

news.title: ‘I hope to retire at 59’: I have $950,000 in my 401(k)s. When do I do a Roth conversion?
news.summary: Roth conversions are permanent. Once done, they cannot be undone. Roth conversions can only be made after a Roth conversion has been made.

news.title: These Alzheimer’s drugs were supposed to revolutionize the way we fight the disease. The reality is more complicated.
news.summary: A scientific report has raised questions about how much Leqimbi and Kisunla really help slow the disease. The drugs have been on the market in the last few years.

news.title: Reed Hastings created a work culture that made Netflix a giant. Can it survive without him?
news.summary: Hastings insisted that employees be ready to give and receive constructive criticism at all times. He said people should be willing to argue for their ideas.

news.title: The real outcome of the Iran war: America is now the world’s most secure energy power
news.summary: The U.S. has fuel and is a safe alternative to the Gulf. Trump’s message is ‘buy American’
